display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Figtree at massive scale with tight tracking, weight 800.

headline.purpose: Section headers. Figtree, weight 700, slightly smaller than display.

title.purpose: Card titles, subsection headers. Figtree weight 600.

body.purpose: Paragraph text. Figtree weight 400-500 for invisible readability.

label.purpose: Category tags, form labels. Always uppercase with wide tracking.

mono.purpose: Code snippets, technical labels. JetBrains Mono.

shadows.name: ambient-glow
shadows.purpose: Floating cards and overlays. Creates levitation.

motion.name: ease-expo-out
motion.purpose: Column reveals, text slide animations. Sharp deceleration.

motion.name: ease-smooth
motion.purpose: Nav transitions on scroll. Smooth and weighted.

motion.name: duration-medium
motion.purpose: Nav resize, card hover, text reveal.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA button with animated conic-gradient border and orange hover glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #09090b; color: #fff; padding: 20px 48px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.3s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 0 40px -10px rgba(234, 88, 12, 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ea580c; outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Nav CTA with gradient fill and spinning border on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #27272a, #09090b); color: #a1a1aa; padding: 10px 24px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3); transition: color 0.3s, transform 0.3s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { color: #fff; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ea580c; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Semi-transparent card with gradient border and backdrop blur. Used for feature sections.
components.html:
High-Performance API

Connect to the payment network with unified API access.
components.css: .ds-card-feature { position: relative; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.1), rgba(255,255,255,0)); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border-radius: 2.5rem; padding: 40px; color: #fff; transition: border-color 0.5s; } .ds-card-feature__icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 16px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.1), rgba(255,255,255,0.05)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 24px; color: #fff; } .ds-card-feature__title { font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.025em; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-card-feature__body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.625; color: #9ca3af; }

components.name: Underline Input
components.description: Minimal underline-only input with floating label animation.
components.css: .ds-input-group { position: relative; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding: 12px 0; color: #fff; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.3s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: transparent; } .ds-input:focus { border-bottom-color: #ea580c; } .ds-input-label { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 12px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #a1a1aa; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; font-weight: 500; transition: all 0.3s; pointer-events: none; } .ds-input:focus + .ds-input-label, .ds-input:not(:placeholder-shown) + .ds-input-label { top: -20px; font-size: 0.625rem; color: #ea580c; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed floating pill nav that shrinks on scroll.
components.html:
Better Switch
HomeSolutionsAbout
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 32px; max-width: 64rem; width: 100%; padding: 16px 24px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-nav__brand { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #fff; letter-spacing: -0.025em; } .ds-nav__links { display: flex; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav__links a { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #9ca3af; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.3s; } .ds-nav__links a:hover { color: #fff; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Small rounded pill with status dot indicator. Used for announcements and status badges.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.1), rgba(255,255,255,0)); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); } .ds-pill__dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #ea580c; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.5); } .ds-pill__text { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); letter-spacing: 0.05em; }

narrative.overview:
Better Switch is Payment Systems as a Service: the platform for people who launch payment companies. The visual system channels infrastructural confidence: precise, capable, understated. Every element communicates capability and control.

The aesthetic is light-first and typographically driven. Figtree headlines at extrabold weight establish authority; lighter weights deliver clarity. The color palette is Committed: a warm off-white canvas with a confident orange accent that carries 30-40% of brand-visible surface. This is not a restrained brand. It is a confident one.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-dominant with intentional light mode parity
Single-accent color discipline (orange as signal, not theme)
Generous negative space punctuated by dense information displays
Choreographed scroll-driven entrances, not ambient animation
Gradient borders as structural articulation, not decoration

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Orange appears on no more than 10% of any screen surface. Its purpose is to direct attention, not to theme the page. If orange is everywhere, it signals nothing.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Pure #000000 and #ffffff are never used. Every neutral carries a slight blue-zinc tint.

rules.name: The Four-Register Rule
rules.body: Manrope is for headlines. Inter is for prose. Geist is for numbers. Geist Mono is for code. Never cross registers.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Depth appears only as a response to interaction or to separate a floating overlay from its context.

dos: Do use Signal Orange exclusively for interactive elements, status indicators, and the footer CTA banner. Keep it under 10% of surface area per screen.
Do use the gradient-border system for surface articulation.
Do maintain the four-register type system: Manrope for headlines, Inter for prose, Geist for numbers, Geist Mono for code.
Do use tonal layering (opacity steps on white) to create depth on dark backgrounds.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion for all scroll animations and continuous animations.
Do use uppercase + wide tracking (0.1em) for labels and category markers.
donts: Don't use neon accents, blockchain terminology, or web3 visual language.
Don't use navy blue, conservative stock photography, or corporate banking visual patterns.
Don't use cartoon illustrations, pastel gradients, or playful consumer fintech aesthetics.
Don't use blurred product screenshots with gradient overlays as hero images.
Don't use the beige/cream/soft-gradient SaaS template aesthetic.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient).
Don't use border-left or border-right as colored accent stripes on cards.
Don't use identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated.
Don't use modals as the first solution.
Don't use em dashes in copy.
